programme.desc: Murdoch investigates when a soldier's corpse is found suspended in a tree.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Ignoring a puzzling break-in at Station 4, Murdoch travels to Buffalo to help Dr. Ogden solve the suspicious death of a young cancer patient at a children's hospital.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The master of a wealthy household is found face down in his morning porridge.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch meets Detective Marcel Guillaume, the man who inspired Inspector Maigret.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch realizes a painting may depict a crime scene, but the artist cannot speak.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch is embroiled in international affairs when a corpse is found with a secret letter.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A telephone operator and amateur sleuth hears a woman being strangled on the line.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch's ex-lover Anna visits Toronto on her way to be married but her fiancé vanishes.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Probing a priest's murder Murdoch learns his long-lost sister is now a nun who claims a demon caused the death.

programme.title: Come and Find Me
programme.desc: A man gets caught in the criminal underworld as he searches for his girlfriend, who's mysteriously disappeared

programme.title: Alice, Darling
programme.desc: A woman's identity and friendships are tested as she breaks free from her psychologically abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: Black Bear
programme.desc: A director works on her latest screenplay at a cabin, where she witnesses the deterioration of a marriage.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A precocious young writer becomes involved with her high school creative writing teacher.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: A mommy vlogger seeks to uncover the truth behind her best friend Emily's sudden disappearance.

programme.title: 10th & Wolf [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: While serving in the military, a Marine sergeant (James Marsden) believes his family's ties to organized crime are a thing of the past. However, an act of insubordination and a visit from the F.B.I. send him packing to his South Philadelphia hometown, and he discovers that his brother (Brad Renfro) and his cousin (Giovanni Ribisi) have become entangled with mobsters, leaving him with only one way to save them.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Hit & Run [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Charlie Bronson (Dax Shepard), a nice guy with a shady past as a getaway driver, breaks out of the witness protection program in a backwater California town to drive his girlfriend, Annie (Kristen Bell), to Los Angeles for an important job interview. The pair's road trip takes an awkward and dangerous turn when they find that an inept federal agent (Tom Arnold) and the mobster (Bradley Cooper) he testified against are both trying to hunt them down.

programme.title: Watership Down
programme.desc: Hoping to escape destruction by human developers and save their community, a colony of rabbits, led by Hazel and Fiver, seek out a safe place to set up a new warren.

programme.title: Take Me Home Tonight
programme.desc: Four years after graduation, an awkward high school genius uses his sister's boyfriend's Labor Day party

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: The Rebound
programme.desc: In New York City, a single mom captivates her new neighbor, a much younger man.

programme.title: Spacehunter: Adventures In The Forbidden Zone
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with an orphan to rescue three women kidnapped by the ruler of a plague-infected planet.

programme.title: Solo
programme.desc: An android killing machine begins to develop a human conscience.

programme.title: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Justice isn't merely blind. Now, it's stupid, lazy and irresponsible, too.

programme.title: The Throwaways
programme.desc: A notorious hacker captured by the CIA is given a proposition: Work for them or spend the rest of his life in prison.

programme.title: Boston Blackie & The Law
programme.desc: A woman convict takes advantage of Morris' magic show to escape and seek vengeance on her former partner who let her take the fall for a crime they both committed. She and the ex-partner are both murdered, and Morris figures out whodunit.

programme.title: Jason And The Argonauts
programme.desc: The legendary Greek hero leads a team of intrepid adventurers in a perilous quest for the legendary Golden Fleece.

programme.title: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Humphrey Bogart s final screen appearance as a cynical sportswriter involved in the boxing racket.

programme.title: Berserk!
programme.desc: The sexy owner of a small traveling circus is under suspicion when the circus becomes plagued by a spate of murders.

programme.title: The Lone Wolf And His Lady
programme.desc: Ron Randell plays a former jewel thief turned reporter, who gets into trouble when he is assigned to cover the exhibition of a famous diamond. When the jewel disappears, Randell is accused of stealing it. It is all Randell can do to keep out of the police's reach, so he can track down the real culprits.

programme.title: 99 Homes
programme.desc: A recently unemployed single father struggles to get back his foreclosed home by working for the real estate broker who is the source of his frustration.

programme.title: The Blackout: Invasion Earth
programme.desc: When military forces venture outside, they discover a shocking truth — corpses everywhere. In stores, in cars, on roads, in hospitals and railway stations. Who or what is destroying all life on Earth? And how long can the last outpost of mankind endure?

programme.title: Journey to the End of Night
programme.desc: A son and his father separately plot to escape their lives in the underworld of Brazil's sex industry.

programme.title: The Rising Hawk
programme.desc: The Mongol Empire had grown to the largest the world had ever known. It's armies now laid siege to much of Eastern Europe. A small village fights for freedom in the frontier landscape of the Carpathian Mountains.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: A ragtag group of Pennsylvanians barricade themselves in an old farmhouse to remain safe from a bloodthirsty, flesh-eating breed of monsters who are ravaging the East Coast of the United States.

programme.title: House of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: Ray becomes the chief suspect when the nightclub he is working at is robbed and the owner's son killed.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
programme.desc: While transfering two female convicts, two former black ops agents are attacked by unknown assailants.

programme.title: The Package
programme.desc: A courier for a crime lord must deliver a mysterious package while chased by a horde of unusual gangsters.

programme.title: 12 Rounds 3: Lockdown
programme.desc: A police officer attempts to turn in incriminating evidence of illegal activities against his fellow cops.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: The Brink
programme.desc: A reckless police inspector is on a mission to crack down on a criminal's gold smuggling scheme.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A master swordsman must once again wield his weapon against those who threaten his desire to live in peace.

programme.title: The Emperor's Sword
programme.desc: After hiding a deadly sword that bestows great power upon its wielder, the emperor dies and a deranged rebel seizes power. Now, the young daughter of a great general is all that stands between a tyrant and his quest for domination.

programme.title: Fist of the Condor
programme.desc: A martial-arts master battles the world's greatest assassins to protect a sacred, ancient manual from falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Not My Family: The Monique Smith Story
programme.desc: Monique Smith goes on a decades-long search to discover who she really is.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: In a search for answers, a woman uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: Escaping the NXIVM Cult with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: Catherine Oxenberg's personal fight to save her daughter

programme.title: Flint
programme.desc: Gripping retelling of a crisis that shook a nation

programme.title: Not My Family: The Monique Smith Story
programme.desc: Monique Smith goes on a decades-long search to discover who she really is.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef.

programme.title: Love and the Radio Star
programme.desc: Hired to rebrand a radio show, Savannah finds herself falling in love after working with the host.

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco
programme.desc: Jimmie & his best friend Mont try to reclaim the home built by Jimmie's grandfather, launching them on a poignant odyssey that connects them to their past, even as it tests their friendship & sense of belonging in the place they call home.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: Star (Sasha Lane), an adolescent girl from a troubled home, runs away with a traveling sales crew that drives across the American Midwest selling subscriptions door-to-door. Finding her feet in this gang of teenagers, one of whom is Jake (Shia LaBeouf), she soon gets into the group's lifestyle of hard-partying nights, law-bending days and young love.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: In three defining chapters, Chiron, a young Black man growing up in Miami, is guided to manhood by the kindness, support, and love of his community.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Women of the Jury
programme.desc: A man is on trial accused of murder of two young black men, and twelve women are called to serve on the jury. After deliberation, one juror is convinced the man is not guilty, while the majority claims he is guilty. A conversation takes place consisting of arguments, alliances, and near violence. What will the verdict be?

programme.title: In Transit
programme.desc: In New York City, friends Leon and Rollo, live a fast life of drugs and women. From an unexpected mistake in their past, they owe a debt to a well-known drug kingpin. They soon find out the fast money is more than they bargained for, but leaving it behind, will prove to be even more challenging.

programme.title: Kingsmen
programme.desc: Follows the story of the King family, a known crime syndicate in Dallas. When the beloved patriarch is killed, they fall under the wrath of a rival crime family, as well as local law enforcement. The four eldest brothers will do everything they can to protect their family.

programme.title: Scandalous
programme.desc: Lady Watts, a bestselling author, reveals secrets about her affairs with those closest to her in her latest memoir. At her launch party, a heated argument turns violent, and she's left unconscious. As detectives investigate, secrets, love triangles, and betrayal emerge. The search for the attacker leads to twists and turns, involving everyone from her talent manager to her labelmate. The truth about the night of the attack is slowly revealed, with unexpected consequences for all involved.

programme.title: Nowhere to be Found
programme.desc: Two sisters go on a senior trip to Mexico, led by Ava’s boyfriend Trent. Meanwhile, journalist Jessica Vandross is going to the same Mexican town in search of her sister’s killer after escaping a sex trafficking ring. These stories collide, in a thrilling fight for their lives.

programme.title: The Final Level: Escaping Rancala
programme.desc: An arcade manager has to save her brother after he is transported into a video game.

programme.title: War of the Worlds 2: The Next Wave
programme.desc: The aliens return to complete their plan of human domination, launching a second attack to destroy humanity.

programme.title: Dragon Crusaders
programme.desc: Fugitive Knights Templar are cursed. They must defeat the wizard-dragon to break the spell and save the world.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Earth is laid to ruin when massive walkers annihilate all in their path as an astrophysicist finds his son.

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: A spacecraft lands in New York and heads toward our Capital. If it arrives, it will trigger an invasion.

programme.title: The Innkeepers (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees -Claire (Sara Paxton) and Luke (Pat Healy)- are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels. As the Inns final days draw near, odd guests check in as the pair of minimum wage ghost hunters begin to experience strange and alarming events that may ultimately cause them to be mere footnotes in the hotels long unexplained history.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: Legacy Of Blood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Elvira presents this horror thriller where a family is stalked by an unknown killer while attending the reading of a relative's will.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 2
programme.desc: It's been eight years since the opening night tragedy of Hell House, LLC and still many unanswered questions remain. Thanks to an anonymous tip, investigative journalist Jessica Fox is convinced that key evidence is hidden inside the abandoned Abaddon Hotel-evidence that will shed light on the hotel's mysteries. She assembles a team equally hungry for answers with one goal: break into the hotel and discover the truth.

programme.title: Wendigo
programme.desc: A boy (Erik Per Sullivan) believes a folk tale about a shape-shifting creature has something to do with his family's (Patricia Clarkson, Jake Weber) bad luck.

programme.title: Clovehitch Killer, The
programme.desc: A picture-perfect family is shattered when the work of a serial killer hits too close to home. Dylan McDermott stars in this chilling portrait of all-American evil.

programme.title: Reef, The
programme.desc: Four friends are left stranded and must swim through shark-infested waters to shore. A Great White immediately follows them for a white-knuckle chase that will fill the waters with blood!

programme.title: Banquet, A
programme.desc: A mother is radically tested when her teenage daughter insists a supernatural experience has left her body in service to a higher power.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Daniel Boone, Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone (Bruce Bennett) battles Shawnee warriors as he leads a band of settlers into Kentucky in this frontier potboiler from Albert C. Gannaway Productions. Made at the height of Hollywood's fascination with pioneer days, the film also stars Lon Chaney Jr. as Chief Blackfish, and country singer Faron Young as a handsome young suitor for Boone's daughter. There's plenty of action and danger here as the Shawnee are convinced that Boone is trying to steal their land. But Boone is ready, not even fearing death by tomahawk. It isn't how you die, Boone says. It's what you live for.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An Apache brave seeks vengeance on a band of sadistic gold hunters in this bloody drive-in western. Pitcalin (Jody McRae) leads the marauders who wipe out an Apache camp when they discover gold, only to watch their violent deeds lead to their own demise. Featuring a superb cast that also includes Dan Kemp, Robert Tessier, and Joel McRae, this coldblooded western tale was directed by character actor and filmmaker Jack Starrett (Cleopatra Jones, The Losers).

programme.title: Broken Arrow

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly welcome culinary producer Allison Cancro as a guest co-host while Carla Hall is performing her one-woman show. The team creates an affordable sausage and peppers dish with corn and tomato salad, keeping the total cost under $25 for four people. Allison shares her Jersey Italian heritage and family food traditions, while the hosts discuss farmer's markets, fresh produce, and regional ingredients. A video segment features Carla Hall preparing bone-in pork chops with smashed sweet potatoes. The episode concludes with a Price Is Right-style pricing game featuring grocery items.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly kick off July 4th week with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, a returning favorite from the Rachael Ray Show who pioneered the "Watermelon Palooza" segment. Together they prepare summer cookout essentials: Watermelon Aperol Margaritas with frozen fruit ice, a Watermelon Cucumber Salad served in an artfully carved watermelon bowl, and taste-test limited-edition Lay's World Cup chips. The episode celebrates simple, accessible recipes perfect for backyard gatherings, with Donnarumma sharing pro tips on watermelon carving and ingredient selection while the hosts discuss recipe inspiration and kitchen mood-boosters.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon joins Clinton Kelly and Stacy London for a July Fourth-themed episode where he teaches the notoriously non-cooking Stacy how to grill skirt steak with a quick charred corn salsa featuring tomatillos, jalapeños, and garlic. The episode showcases fundamental cooking techniques including seasoning, temperature control, and proper resting. Stacy surprises the group with an air fryer and attempts to make dairy-free s'mores using gluten-free cookies and specialty peanut butter cups, leading to comedic mishaps. The hosts also discuss their new show "Why'd They Wear That," where they critique character wardrobes from films and television. The episode emphasizes that cooking is about patience, proper technique, and feeding people you care about.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Clinton Kelly, and Carla Hall welcome renowned chef Marco Canora, founder of Brodo bone broth and executive chef of Hearth restaurant in New York City. Canora shares how broth became central to his wellness journey and cooking philosophy. The hosts and guest prepare a roasted half-chicken with a pan sauce made from brodo, demonstrating how quality broth elevates home cooking. The episode includes a NYC food-themed "Chew It or Screw It" game and explores Canora's approach to seasonal, farm-to-table cooking. Canora reveals creative applications of broth, including savory beverage variations with olive oil, bacon fat, and other ingredients.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In the debut episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon welcomes viewers into his Venice, California front yard alongside his wife Liz Symon and their friend Olivia Annacone Cisic for an unfiltered, laid-back cookout. Celebrating Cinco de Mayo, Michael prepares simple yet flavorful black cod fish tacos on a plancha, walking through his approach to seasoning, cooking fish by sight, and building a bright, crunchy slaw with cabbage, citrus, and charred poblanos. The conversation flows easily as the trio shares cooking tips, debates ingredients like corn versus flour tortillas, and jokes about knife sharpening habits, cilantro preferences, and home cooking realities. Liz complements the meal with a refreshing jalapeño margarita, balancing heat with fresh lime juice, simple syrup, and a hint of orange liqueur, while adding her own creative twist with lemon and bitters. Throughout the episode, the group emphasizes flexibility in cooking—encouraging viewers to adjust flavors, garnishes, and spice levels to their own tastes. Lighthearted banter continues as they assemble tacos, discuss plating ideas, and highlight optional additions like crema and avocado. The episode wraps with a taste test, enthusiastic reactions to both the tacos and cocktail, and a reminder that great food doesn’t have to be complicated—just fresh, simple, and made with joy.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Liz Symon, and Olivia Annacone Cisic tackle a brunch-inspired twist on eggs Benedict by swapping traditional Canadian bacon for crispy pastrami and pairing it with a mustard-spiked hollandaise sauce. Michael walks through a foolproof blender hollandaise method while explaining the science behind emulsifying butter and keeping the sauce warm, making the intimidating brunch staple feel approachable for home cooks. As the family cooks together, the conversation bounces between Olivia’s skepticism about poached eggs, Liz’s love of runny yolks, and memories of iconic pastrami spots like Langer’s and Katz’s. The group also debates poaching techniques, from classic whirlpool methods to muffin tin hacks for feeding a crowd. Humor carries the episode throughout as Michael teases Olivia’s picky eating habits and the family jokes about “buttering muffins” and hollandaise disasters. Liz complements the rich brunch dish with a citrus-forward mimosa made from blood oranges, sumo oranges, lemon juice, and frozen strawberries used as flavorful ice cubes. Once plated, the pastrami Benedict wins Olivia over completely, with the crispy pastrami and tangy mustard hollandaise becoming the standout combination. The episode wraps with the family enjoying brunch cocktails, discussing make-ahead egg tips, and Michael reminding viewers that restaurant-quality brunch can come together quickly and simply at home.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off a new era of Simply Symons from Venice, California, joined by Liz Symon and Olivia “Liv” Annacone Cisic for a laid-back backyard cookout centered around the ultimate burger debate: smash burgers versus classic pub burgers. Michael walks through the techniques behind each style, from selecting the ideal fat ratio for ground beef to achieving the perfect crust on a hot grill and cast iron griddle. Along the way, the trio shares stories about old Symon’s Dinners episodes, Liv’s transition into motherhood, and the realities of filming outdoors with planes overhead, lawn equipment buzzing nearby, and neighborhood life unfolding around them. As Michael builds both burgers with grilled onions, pickles, secret sauce, and different cheeses, the conversation turns into a humorous discussion about condiments, cooking preferences, smash burger myths, and burger nostalgia. Liz keeps the energy going with playful jabs at Michael while also preparing his favorite cocktail, the bourbon-based Paper Plane, complete with Aperol, Amaro, and fresh lemon juice. The episode wraps with a tasting session comparing both burgers side-by-side, with everyone weighing in on which version wins the battle. Between the casual banter, cooking tips, and family-style atmosphere, the episode delivers an easygoing and highly approachable backyard burger feast.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Memorial Day-themed episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon cooks outdoors with his wife Liz and co-host Olivia Annacone Cisic, preparing grilled shrimp skewers with a honey-soy-orange glaze, a pineapple salsa, and a coconut rice pilaf, while Liz mixes up a frothy pineapple daiquiri with an egg-white twist. The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. Michael walks through his Memorial Day menu, highlighting a coconut rice made with jasmine rice, coconut milk, and a coconut curry lime bone broth from friend Marco Canora's brand Brodo, plus a bright pineapple salsa built with cilantro, scallion, red pepper, jalapeño, honey, and a dashi soy sauce sourced from Santa Monica's McCall's butcher. A lively debate breaks out over rice ratios and rinsing technique, with Liz advocating for a 1:1¾ ratio while Michael sticks to his two-to-one method, and Olivia sharing that she recently cooked jasmine rice for her unwell dog Zeke. Throughout the cooking session, mishaps and humor keep things lively — limes refuse to juice, Liz nearly topples the dashi bottle, and Michael accidentally steps on their dog Min. Discussions range from shrimp varieties and sizing (the U-number system), to the fruity heat of jalapeños and habaneros, to favorite hot sauces including Crystal and the Florida datil-pepper-based Zabs. Liz's honest palate becomes a recurring theme, with Michael crediting her direct, critical feedback as a key ingredient in his culinary success over the years. Liz dry-shakes her egg-white pineapple daiquiri before adding ice for a frothy finish, then adjusts the balance mid-tasting by swirling in extra pineapple juice. The shrimp grill up with beautiful caramelization from the honey glaze, and the coconut rice is finished simply with cilantro and cracked black pepper. During the final tasting, Olivia — a self-described texture-averse pasta lover — bravely tries the shrimp, endorsing the flavors while admitting she prefers the coconut rice. Michael closes the episode wishing viewers a happy Memorial Day and reminding them to keep things simple and delicious.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon grills a spatchcock chicken with avgolemono sauce in his Venice Beach front yard, joined by his wife Liz and co-host Liv. The episode features a lavender lemon drop martini and explores grill techniques for perfectly crispy, juicy poultry.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Simply Symons episode, hosts Michael and Liz Symon, alongside Liv Annacone, prepare a summer-inspired dish featuring seared halloumi cheese topped with warm strawberries, fresh mint, pistachios, and a red wine vinaigrette infused with honey and cracked black pepper. Liz creates a homemade strawberry simple syrup using fresh and frozen strawberries, which becomes the base for a refreshing strawberry vodka martini garnished with mint. The hosts discuss the unique properties of halloumi—a Cypriot cheese that doesn't melt and develops a savory crust when seared—and explore the classic pairing of sweet and salty flavors. They also share storage tips for fresh herbs and berries, mention the superior quality of local Harry's berries, and discuss favorite summer TV shows.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this episode of Simply Symons, hosts Michael Symon and Liz Symon, joined by Liv Annacone, bring the show indoors to cook during warm weather. Michael creates an elevated crab grilled cheese sandwich using mascarpone, jumbo lump crab meat, Old Bay seasoning, tarragon mustard, and pickled red onions, with parmigiano-reggiano crust for extra crispness. Meanwhile, Liz prepares an orange whip cocktail with a modern twist, substituting tangerine juice for traditional orange juice and combining vodka, rum, Grand Marnier, and heavy cream. The episode showcases kitchen techniques like gentle folding to preserve crab lumps and discusses alternative grilled cheese fillings, while celebrating nostalgic Cleveland dining memories and mall culture.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: On Father's Day, Michael Symon prepares his ideal meal featuring a dry-aged prime ribeye steak seasoned with beef tallow, kosher salt, and pepper, grilled to a perfect char. He creates a vibrant salsa verde with anchovies, capers, fresh herbs (tarragon, parsley, mint), and red wine vinegar to complement the rich beef. Liz Symon crafts an equal-parts cocktail combining bourbon, amaro, and blood orange juice with cold brew coffee, garnished with a blood orange peel and crunchy salt. Michael also grills bitter endive with olive oil and finishes plates with orange segments. Throughout, the hosts discuss beef tallow versus olive oil, charcoal selection, proper salt techniques, and how the steak's varying fat content creates different doneness levels across a single cut.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: For the Fourth of July, Michael Symon showcases his approach to smoked ribs, starting with a custom cherry BBQ sauce made from cherry juice, sherry vinegar, molasses, bourbon, cold brew coffee, and warm spices. He explains his smoking technique at 300-325°F for two and a half hours, finishing the ribs on the grill for char and caramelization. Meanwhile, Liz Symon prepares a tart cherry Negroni—an equal-parts cocktail featuring gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, tart cherry juice, and a splash of seltzer. The episode balances savory and sweet as the hosts discuss rib texture preferences, ideal side dishes, and the versatility of the cherry sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Chris Makes Beef & Broccoli" - Who doesn't love broccoli beef (other than vegetarians)??? Lucky for you, Chris Ying woke up with a craving for THAT EXACT DISH. Here he shows you how to make his dead simple version (using the microwave to speed things up). This is some high-quality weeknight cooking, people! Make it for yourself and let us know what you think.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking School - David Chang Makes 5 Easy Recipes Using His New Korean BBQ Sauces: David Chang shows off some of his favorite ways to use his new Momofuku Korean BBQ Sauces, including a vinaigrette salad dressing that he makes two different salads for, a simple beef & broccoli recipe, Dakdoritang (spicy chicken stew), Gamja Jorim (Korean braised potatoes), and a deliciously easy steak sauce.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Hetty McKinnon's Eggplant Mapo" - Hetty McKinnon, an Australian Chinese cookbook author and James Beard Award finalist, stops by the studio to show Chris Ying how to make her Eggplant Mapo—a delicious twist on Mapo Tofu.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Designing a Menu for Tyler Huggins" - Dave and Chris Ying start menu-planning for their friend, Tyler Huggins, outdoorsman, entrepreneur, son of bison farmers, beer drinker, and founder of Meati. Spoiler alert: This one’s a struggle.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Tyler Huggins" - This week’s guest, Tyler Huggins (founder and CEO of Meati), is on his way in to the studio. Dave’s not feeling confident, but he starts prepping for the meal anyway.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey hits the streets of Bogota to check out the controversial trade in emeralds, the famous Juan Valdez Cafe, and some classic Colombian cuisine at an elevation of 10,000 feet. A flight to Armenia and subsequent Willy's Jeep trek uncover a remote and hidden world of quaint coffee towns and boutique farms where Joey hosts a group of international coffee buyers.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Following an excursion to the extremely remote Gnobe Bugle Village, Joey Jeep-treks the terrain from the top of Volcan Baru. The search for coffee known to cost $1,000 per pound leads Joey to the eclectic town of Boquete, a plunge-worthy volcanic river-filled-crevasse, and awe-inspiring Gesha coffee farms with more rainbows and hummingbirds than one could possibly imagine.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: All roads in the pursuit of excellence lead to Japan. Joey discovers that specialty canned coffee from a vending machine pairs well with street food. Bullet train travel leads to a tea farm trek and tasting, coffee in a rickshaw, and Yemen mocha brewed Arab style. Joey makes coffee history in Kyoto preparing and brewing "Geisha" coffee with an authentic Japanese Geisha.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa visits a local sugar shack to learn how maple syrup is made during the early spring maple syrup season in Maine. Back at home, she bakes a maple walnut cake, then treats her chickens to some winter treats and shares an easy DIY project for the chicken coop.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa visits a local farm for some expert tips for growing strawberries in Maine, then she shares her secret family strawberry shortcake recipe. She's also growing basil this summer, so she adds some fresh basil and strawberries to her homemade lemonade.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: It's spring in Maine, so Lisa is planting seeds and getting ready for baby chicks. After making a fun DIY project for her chickens who lay eggs, she shares her best tips and attempts to get one of her hens to raise some baby chicks, then shares a recipe for Scotch Eggs.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Meet some of Lisa's poultry pals, including a curious Indian runner duck named Fern and one of her French Marans hens who lays gorgeous chocolate brown eggs. Then she shares some of her best tips for raising a mixed flock of chickens, ducks and geese.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa makes a visit to a lavender farm in Maine to learn all about growing and using the aromatic herb in baking and to make a natural chicken coop spray. Back at home, she bakes lavender cupcakes, makes some ice cream, then makes a chicken-themed cornhole game for the backyard.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa heads to a lobster pound on the coast of Maine for a fresh seafood lunch, then gets some tips on cooking lobster. Back at home, she bakes a Maine favorite sweet treat - Whoopie pies - then builds a curbside stand using wooden pallets to sell fresh eggs and flowers.

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa makes a small basket using wood scraps and wire. Then she takes a trip to a local orchard and bakes an apple pie with some of the apples she's picked. She demonstrates how to make homemade apple cider vinegar, introduces several of her chickens, then makes them some apple treats.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia heads to South Carolina to meet the many talented artisans that define Lowcountry. From a basket weaver who is keeping the sweetgrass tradition of the Gullah Geechee people alive, to an intercoastal inspired shrimp recipe served in ironware crafted right down the street. Find out why the Lowcountry is defined by its character as much as it is a spot on the map.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to a festival in the Ozarks where she is teaching a cooking class. We follow her as she prepares and gathers her ingredients — we meet a small town chicken farmer, gather produce at the local farmers market, and set the table at a local textile studio where Georgia learns to dye napkins.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia is in Charleston, South Carolina where she is preparing a dinner at historic Fenwick Hall. She invites a legendary queen of Southern cooking to come by and teach her the secret to her two ingredient biscuits, learns a Nigerian inspired cocktail from a local sommelier, and heads out on the water to harvest oysters. Georgia also shares her tips for setting a southern outdoor table.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits Tuscany to get back to her own roots, and learn about the generations of families who are carrying on their family's traditions, some for centuries. She goes truffle hunting, learns to make fresh pasta, how to taste wine, and samples the incredible cheeses from the sheep grazing in front of her - experiencing the true value in living off the land.

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to the Rosebud Native American Reservation in South Dakota and spends time with the Lakota people who are pursuing the “7-generation framework” – their vision for the next 150 years. She learns about the work they are doing to reclaim their food sovereignty, their culture and language, to bring their people back to that sacred place of equilibrium that is essential in building a strong and sovereign tribal nation - where they are physically, spiritually, and mentally whole.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our blooper show returns. We work hard to make this show just for you. But it doesn't always go smoothly, and this is your chance to see for yourself. All the crazy antics we didn't show from Season 2.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: You won't believe what I and my team do to this space in the biggest kitchen renovation this season. My neighbor Barbara is in for the kitchen of her dreams. Watch it all unfold.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Our season 2 finale. Mar and his team celebrate their final reveal and all of season 2. The momentum of the entire show season come together for the perfect send-off. Plus we get to meet Daisy, the newest resident of the makeover street.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Meet the Breslin family, new to Fairfield CT, and their fixer-upper back yard and guest cottage. Mar thinks he's all set after they move in to the main house, but when he agrees to work on their outdoor living spaces he has no idea what he's in for. But the transformation leaves them amazed. Plus: Mar does a little free-falling without a parachute.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It might be Fall in New England, but Mar makes it easy to get in the swim of things! This incredible backyard makeover & reveal will make you (and the makeover family) smile from ear to ear. A year in the making, its a transformation you won't want to miss. But after Mar plays a reporter in a shark attack movie will you be afraid to go back in the water? Watch him film it and find out!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Will Mar's design dreams go up in smoke? With some spare time between projects, Mar turns his attention to his own home, Rosebrook Gardens. This time: updating and reworking an entire side of the house: fireplace, mantel, hearth & chimney. Plus new patio, landscaping, outdoor furnishings & accessories. In a twist, Mar hands off the final reveal to Team Mar, will it be up to standards?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: It’s definitely fireplace weather in New England, and Mar has got that covered—outdoors, too! While Mar’s colleague Paul is away on business, Mar goes into overdrive to transform Rosebrook Gardens. And local resources pull together to make it happen. New windows and doors, terrace, fire pit, furniture, and landscaping. It’s a transformation no one could have expected, especially Paul.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Learning about Greystone: With Mar's own home's projects finally complete, it's time for him to get on to the newest big-scale project. Paul has cooked up a surprise: a wonderful new renovation project at a home called Greystone. It needs to be completely overhauled so its true potential can shine. But Paul hasn't told Mar everything and there is quite an unexpected discovery awaiting him.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Renovation continues: Despite the extent of the work needed, the walls start to come down and a brand new, state-of-the-art home begins to rise in its place. There are a lot of moving parts to keep track of. The first completely finished rooms? 4 completely renovated bathrooms. Taking all 4 from down-to-the-studs to spa-like havens is no easy task but the results are Marvellous.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The big renovation of Greystone is at the turning point: time for Mar to turn his attention to creating or updating 4 bedrooms-each with their own en suite! No detail is too small to make it happen: move windows, closets, hallways-heck, move everything! It's a down-to-the-studs approach that he hopes will really pay off. Plus: Mar MC’s a charity dance competition & takes the stage with celebs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: This 4-part home makeover is ready for its grand finale (and a party!) All the areas that the new owners and their guests will use and see every day are done-so the stakes are high! All the modern technological touches call for a special reveal. So Mar throws a party-and has his own surprises waiting for his guests, too. It's Casual Luxury come to life!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: 4 seasons. 4 apartments. 1 building full of design. Watch these Margical makeovers of 4 different apartments. Mar gets challenged to bring 4 new spaces to life-but without any renovation! Watch him take the 4 seasons as inspiration for the 4 apartments. And thanks to help from Ethan Allen these new apartments inspire everyone who visits. Will your favorite be Fall, Winter, Spring or Summer?

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Oops! Can't believe we did that. Yikes! We're going to show you anyway. New! Behind the scenes footage you've never seen. Regular episodes get full fast. (And it's not always smooth sailing.) This fan-favorite episode is stuffed with things you've never seen. Behind-the-scenes & reveals; slip-ups & bloopers & outright embarrassing mistakes. Casual Luxury never looked so, well, casual!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Think small! Small spaces are the new big trend in design. Mar is the master of small space transformation - and shows how it can be applied by staging 2 very different spaces: a small cape style home and a newly constructed apartment complex, both in downtown Westport, CT. You won’t believe how spacious these small footprint Casual Luxury reveals are.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 1: Mar gets a phone call from another time period. The new owners of an honest-to-goodness castle want to restore and renovate their new property using Mar's 6 Casual Luxury design principles as a guide. It could be a Margical makeover of this hidden-away treasure, but there is a lot of work to do. Mar meets the enthusiastic family and learns their era-honoring plans.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Cornwall Castle, Part 2: Mar lets down the drawbridge to show you the big reveal! Mar heads back to the castle to check the progress, and for the grand tour of the final results. His 6 Casual Luxury design principles were the owners' guide, and they definitely work in every time period! Watch this distressed property find it's "happily ever after"! (It's a Wow!)

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating 40! 40 original episodes, that is. So Mar’s looking back at three full seasons of Casual Luxury designs. Our favorite moments and yours. Join Mar and the Team on this very special episode as we look back at many of the places, characters, fun, makeovers and trips that make the series special—plus a rare look at the very beginning and some new reveals, too. Celebrate with us!

programme.title: Wind The Bobbin Up - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Wind the bobbin up. Wind the bobbin up. Pull, pull, clap, clap, clap.” Get up and dance with this super fun version of the traditional English nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Hot Cross Buns - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Here’s one of our favorite traditional nursery rhymes about food, made super simple. Come sing along with the Chef from our “Do You Know The Muffin Man?” and “Pat-A-Cake” videos. Yum yum!

programme.title: Flying Dragon Fruit Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Come forth brave warriors and watch the Bumble Nums catch some Flying Dragon Fruits for their fiery Flying Dragon Fruit Cake! But be careful! They breathe fire and are very fast!

programme.title: Carl's Big Adventure - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Carl is visited by three large, very dirty construction vehicles. But Carl’s Car Wash is not big enough to fit them! Carl has an idea! He can supersize his car wash so the vehicles can get a proper scrub-a-dub-dub. He just needs a few parts. With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! Don't miss Carl in his first mini-movie as he pushes himself to the limit in the name of vehicular cleanliness!

programme.title: Where Is Baby? - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Peekaboo! Sing along with this adorable song for kids, “Where Is Baby?” Where is baby? Where is baby? Where is baby? There he is.

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash 2
programme.desc: All new episodes with brand new vehicles taking trip through Carl’s fantastic car wash! Big rigs, bull dozers!

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Take your little explorer on an exotic musical expedition to meet wild animals from across the globe. Journey to the jungle, savannah, desert and forest.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that; the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover sign language! Enjoy upbeat, classical melodies as you learn how to sign words and activities related to common main street businesses, where your food comes from, activities related to dining out and more. Learn through real-life footage, narration, and repetition.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: One of the greatest joys you'll ever experience is bonding with your baby during those calm, quiet moments. Lullaby Time: Soothing Sounds for Baby provides comforting sights and sounds as you relax and share this precious downtime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies turn one year old, they continue to develop their communication skills. Meanwhile, with you as their guide, they also begin to explore the world beyond their front door. Baby's Favorite Places presents them with a playful introduction to 20 words for the names of familiar locations from the market, to the library, to the local park.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Little Eddie Popular Rhymes
programme.desc: Learning is always fun with Little Eddie popular nursery rhymes. We bring to you some amazing songs for kids to sing along with us and have a good time. Kids will dance, laugh, sing and play along with our videos while they also learn numbers, letters, colors, good habits and more!

programme.title: Old Macdonald & More Popular Rhymes
programme.desc: Traditional songs are great for learning a new language! Practice the animals in English with this timeless classic about farm animals!

programme.title: Little Red Car - Unlimited Songs
programme.desc: Each this animated children's rhymes compilation with colorful characters, along with catchy music.

programme.title: Colors Song Kids Learning Videos
programme.desc: Kids educational songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Farmees as they sing, dance in this fun kids learning video. Learn about Colors, alphabets, fruits, planets, phonics, numbers, abc, shapes, 123 and more made easy and fun with this preschool nursery rhymes and kids songs playlist.

programme.title: Ben The Train Kids Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Ben the fun kids toy train is back with more songs and rhymes like old Macdonald, Alphabet song, phonics abc song, opposites song, incy wincy spider, five little monkeys, finger family etc. This family friendly children's show promotes learning and family bonds.

programme.title: Humpty Dumpty Nursery Rhymes and Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Enjoy Farmees Humpty Dumpty and popular easy to learn nursery rhymes for babies and toddlers, which the children love to sing and dance along with. Learn these kids songs and new words at the same time.
